title: Nancy Pelosi's husband Paul hit with charges over alleged hit-and-run
description: Paul has been accused of crashing into an unoccupied parked car on the shoulder of a roadway just after 2.30pm in Yountville, a small town in the Wine Country of California on July 3.

title: Paul Pelosi chared in Napa County hit-and-run crash
description: The charges were handed down by the Napa County District Attorney's office.

title: Paul Pelosi charged with misdemeanor hit-and-run in Napa Valley
description: Paul Pelosi, the husband of former House Speaker Nancy Pelosi, has been charged with misdemeanor hit-and-run in Napa County after prosecutors allege he struck a parked vehicle and left the scene.
